name: Photon Jetpack
description: Photon Jetpack — Automattic's CDN for WordPress images served via the Jetpack plugin globally.

seo.title: Photon Jetpack — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Photon Jetpack: Photon Jetpack — Automattic's CDN for WordPress images served via the Jetpack plugin globally.

when_to_use: Serving WordPress images via Automattic's global CDN
Automatic image optimization for WordPress sites via Jetpack
Reducing image server load with CDN offloading via plugin
Resizing images on-the-fly via Photon URL parameters
Free CDN for WordPress.com and Jetpack-connected sites

pros: Free image CDN bundled with WordPress Jetpack
cons: Limited transforms vs Cloudinary or imgix
Occasional image mismatch and cache issues
review.verdict: Convenient free CDN for WordPress blogs on shared hosting, not a serious tool for custom applications.
review.best_for: WordPress hobby sites wanting free image offloading via Jetpack
review.not_for: Custom apps, ecommerce, or teams needing advanced image processing
